title: INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode GITT OCV Extraction
author: Kuhn, Yannick
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Scope 
 This record contains workflows for extracting OCV from GITT measurements during discharging and charging. 
 Files 
 
 
 
 Filename 
 Description 
 Format 
 Usage 
 
 
 
 
  18650-LG-3500-MJ1-Anode_GITT_dch_without_EIS_2320_OCV_extraction.flow  
 Workflow file for extracting open circuit voltage (OCV) data from GITT discharge tests without EIS (ID: 2320). 
 Flow file ( application/x-flow+json ) 
 Automates the extraction of OCV data from GITT discharge tests for analysis. 
 
 
  18650-LG-3500-MJ1-Anode_GITT_ch_without_EIS_2340_OCV_extraction.flow  
 Workflow file for extracting open circuit voltage (OCV) data from GITT charge tests without EIS (ID: 2340). 
 Flow file ( application/x-flow+json ) 
 Automates the extraction of OCV data from GITT charge tests for analysis. 
 
 
 
 Metadata 
 
 
 
 Filename 
 Description 
 Format 
 Usage 
 
 
 
 Related Resources 
      
 
 
  Relationship  
  Record  
  Description  
 
 
  isPartOf  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode  
 This collection points to all the intermediate steps including and between the data obtained on the harvested anode of the MJ1 cylindrical 18650 cell from LG CHEM and its analysis. 
 
 
  Continues  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode GITT Structured Data  
 This record contains GITT measurements during discharge and charge, pre-selected and packaged in parquet files for further analysis. The measurement is obtained in three-electrode configuration with the working electrode composite graphite/silicon oxide, counter electrode NMC, and reference electrode lithium metal in a coin cell casing. The data is intended to support the characterization of the open-circuit potential (OCP) and lithium diffusion proprties of the graphite/silicon oxide active material. 
 
 
  IsContinuedBy  
  INR18650-LG-3500-MJ1 Anode GITT OCV  
 This record contains open-circuit voltage (OCV) data extracted from a GITT measurement on the harvested anode of the MJ1 cylindrical 18650 cell from LG CHEM. The active material of the harvested electrode is composite graphite/silicon oxide. The measurment is obtained in three-electrode configuration with the working electrode composite graphite/silicon oxide, counter electrode NMC, and reference electrode lithium metal in a coin cell casing. The data is intended to support the generation of parameterized OCV curves for use in battery cell modelling. 
 
 
 
 Licensing 
 This dataset is licensed under CC-BY 4.0, allowing for sharing and adaptation with proper attribution. 
 Contact Information 
 For questions or further assistance, please contact Dennis Kopljar at dennis.kopljar@dlr.de. 
 References 
 This dataset is linked to the following publication: [DOI/Link to publication].
